front: What is therapeutic drug monitoring (TDM) for peptide drugs?
back: TDM measures drug levels to optimize dosing. For peptides: 1) Complex PK (non-linear for some), 2) Immunogenicity affects levels, 3) Limited validated assays. Examples: insulin (glucose monitoring), cyclosporine (LC-MS/MS), tacrolimus. Challenges: ADA interference, short half-lives, metabolite activity.
